themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 8 verses. Commentary leans on "No meat offering, which ye shall bring unto the LORD, shall be made with leaven: for ye shall...". Word-study detail reinforces "יֵֽעָשֶׂ֛ה: that is made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".

themes.label: Holiness
themes.summary: This chapter focuses on holiness, righteousness, purity, consecration, or being set apart. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And the remnant of the meat offering shall be Aaron's and his sons': it is a thing most holy...". Cross references echo "Holy".

Commentary leans on "And every oblation of thy meat offering shalt thou season with salt; neither shalt thou suffe...". Cross references echo "Covenant".
